_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in identifying and extracting data of forensic interest in diverse media (i.e., media forensics).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, reviewing harvested metadata, curating business context, and managing access.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-002 (OP, cosine: 0.435), SP-S-002 (SP, cosine: 0.433).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.499). Shared vocabulary: [data, skill]. DCWF-only terms [diverse, extracting, forensic, forensics, i, identifying] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.856, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.7%). "Skill in identifying and extracting data of forensic interest in diverse media (" and "Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, re" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.449 ≈ STS 0.499 (gap 0.049). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.8%. Shared tokens: [data, skill]. DCWF-only: [diverse, extracting, forensic, forensics, i, identifying]. WIDAI-only: [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context].
